positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration featuring a group of forest creatures—a fox, a badger, and an owl—gathered around a glowing lantern. The scene should evoke a sense of magic and gentle adventure. Use a deep jewel-toned color palette (sapphire blues, emerald greens, amethyst purples) contrasted with warm, golden light emanating from the lantern and background fog. The style must be highly detailed vector illustration mixed with watercolor textures, ensuring clean silhouettes and high contrast. Composition should be centered, suitable for a single, impactful apparel print. Focus on intricate foliage and stylized natural elements. Studio lighting, fantasy concept art, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, messy, text, logo, watermark, low detail, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, poor anatomy, realistic photography, grayscale, cropped, cartoonish
